scores.brief_comment: The answer correctly traces the full dependency chain (including the interface layer), covers all required links, introduces no spurious connections, demonstrates clear understanding of the layered architecture, and provides concrete test references that make the information directly usable.

The answer captures many of the key layers (entity, repository, handler, tests) and shows general direction of dependencies, but it adds several components not in the gold standard (e.g., migrations, use‑case layer, templates) and omits some specific test files. The extra, fabricated links lower the hallucination score, while the overall understanding keeps structural awareness relatively high.
